The '''''Eminence''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]].

==History==
It was present at the [[Battle of ThonBoka]], where it recorded the battle, including the climactic duel between [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] (with [[Vuffi Raa]]) and [[Rokur Gepta]].

{{Ship-stub}}
